case_title: FOOK LUN CHEUNG VS. BAY AREA DISPLAY SAN FRANCISCO,INC.,A CALIFORNIA C

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, FOOK LUN AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA DISPLAY SAN FRANCISCO,INC.,A CALIFORNIA C ORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
